title: 10 Herbal Creams For Benign Prostatic Hypertrophy
description: Ginkgo biloba creams contains flavonoids and terpenoids as its active constituents. Flavonoids, particularly quercetin, kaempferol, and isorhapontigenin, have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and discomfort associated with benign prostatic hypertrophy. The terpenoids, including ginkgolides and bilobalide, have antioxidant properties that protect the prostate from oxidative stress and cell damage. These properties help improve blood flow and reduce inflammation in ...
